narrative:
Orlando Gill is a highly-rated goalkeeper with an overall rating of 8.18/10. This places him in the top 1% of goalkeepers at this tournament.

Gill has demonstrated strong shot-stopping ability at this World Cup, averaging 4.312 saves per 90 minutes across 480 minutes played. His contributions to attacking play are minimal, as shown by 0.002 expected assists per 90 minutes. A significant 88% of his overall rating comes from club form, with 12% from this tournament.

As a top-tier goalkeeper, Gill is clearly a crucial player for his national team. Scouts and fans should observe if he maintains his high level of performance, particularly his 4.312 saves per 90 minutes. His rating range of 7.81–8.55 reflects the current match sample size, indicating potential for his tournament rating to stabilize further.
